name: Adventurer GPS Watch
description: Rugged GPS watch with offline topo maps, barometric altimeter and a two-week battery life.

name: AquaFit Hydration Belt
description: Lightweight running belt with two leak-proof flasks and a zip pocket for keys and gels.

name: Alpine Fusion Goggles
description: Anti-fog dual-lens ski goggles with magnetic lens swap and full UV protection.

name: Summit Pro Climbing Harness
description: Fully adjustable sport climbing harness with four gear loops and reinforced tie-in points.

name: TrailBlaze Hiking Boots
description: Waterproof mid-cut hiking boots with aggressive grip and cushioned midsole for long treks.

name: Nomad Travel Backpack 45L
description: Carry-on friendly 45 litre pack with laptop sleeve, rain cover and lockable zips.

name: Glacier Insulated Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12.

name: BasecampFold Camp Stove
description: Foldable two-burner camp stove with piezo ignition and wind shields.

name: Aurora Down Jacket
description: 800-fill responsibly sourced down jacket that packs into its own pocket.

name: RapidRoll Sleeping Pad
description: Self-inflating insulated sleeping pad with R-value 4.5 for three-season comfort.

name: Legend Carbon Trekking Poles
description: Featherweight carbon poles with quick-lock adjustment and cork grips, sold as a pair.

name: Rando Trail Mix Multi-Tool
description: Fourteen-function stainless multi-tool with pliers, blade and bottle opener in a belt pouch.
